# MDX Custom Elements Test

In MDX, tags are compiled as JSX VNodes. A hyphenated tag like `<my-element>` has
`vnode.type === 'my-element'` (a string), so it flows through `renderJSXVNode`.

Before the fix for issue #16273, the `typeof vnode.type === 'string'` case in
`renderJSXVNode` unconditionally called `renderElement`, bypassing all renderers.
After the fix, hyphenated string types fall through to `renderComponentToString`.

<my-element id="mdx-element">hello from mdx</my-element>
